head_of_state: Queen Margrethe II (until Jan 2024) / King Frederik X
brief_history: Denmark transitioned from a Social Liberal-led government under Lars Løkke Rasmussen (2016–2019) to a Social Democratic minority government under Mette Frederiksen after the 2019 elections. A historic broad coalition across left and right was formed after the November 2022 snap election — a unprecedented centrist unity government aimed at tackling energy security and economic challenges post-Ukraine war.
